subject: Is this good enough to install and run Warp?
body:
Hi,

I found a Black Friday deal with the following computer.
It designed for gaming but can we use it for running Warp too?
I am willing to sacrifice speed as long as it works.

Best, Uhnsoo  

   - HP Omen By HP Obelisk Desktop - Intel Core i7 - 16GB Memory - NVIDIA 
   GeForce RTX 2080 - 2TB Hard Drive + 256GB Solid State Drive
